'''Blastails''' were predatory felines that could be found on most levels of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk's]] multilayered forests. Pollen would stick to the fuzzy bulb on their tail, and as they moved about the forest, they would cross-pollinate the flora of their world.

Blastails carried infectious diseases, even ones that were able to infect a healthy full-grown Wookiee. They can shoot these infections through spores on their tip of their tail, usually for defensive purposes in order to escape harm.

{{Creature-stub}}
